details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements. The top_a parameter is properly added to SamplingParams with correct default (0.0), type (float), range [0.0, 1.0], and comprehensive validation. The filtering logic is correctly implemented across all sampler variants (v0 standard sampler, v1 logits processor, v1 TPU sampler) using the formula: mask tokens where probability < top_a * max_probability, then set logits to -inf for renormalization. Threading through intermediate structures is complete and consistent: sampling params → OpenAI protocol → sampling metadata → sampler tensors → sampler implementation. Documentation is thorough with clear docstrings explaining the parameter and its behavior. Code follows vLLM conventions and is syntactically valid. Minor deduction only because the in-place tensor operation (unsqueeze_) requires careful handling, though this appears safe given the fresh tensor allocation pattern in the forward pass. The implementation also correctly marks Top-A as argmax-invariant in logits processors and includes proper edge case handling (spec_decode check, default values in all configs).
